name: smbos-desktop
description: SmbOS desktop shell (Electron). Phase 1 of the strangler-fig switchover: wraps the existing live dashboard in a cross-platform window with a tray and native notifications. The Python engine and the FastAPI server are untouched.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check resolve.js && node --check broker.js && node --check store.js && node --check liveness.js
